## Tags
outwards, direction, north-west, diagonal

## Categories
arrows

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/square-arrow-out-up-left)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::SquareArrowOutUpLeft;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        SquareArrowOutUpLeft { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
